creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:

Date: Sat Jul  6 19:10:32 2013
New Revision: 322406

Log:
  Update to 1.2.2.

==============================================================================

+++ head/sysutils/ansible/Makefile	Sat Jul  6 19:10:32 2013	(r322406)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	ansible
-PORTVERSION=	1.2.1

 CATEGORIES=	sysutils python
 MASTER_SITES=	http://ansibleworks.com/releases/

 task-execution, and multinode orchestration framework.
